headline: Danaher Valuation Reset Highlights Recurring Revenues And Lean Operating Framework
summary: Danaher (NYSE:DHR) is trading near its lowest valuation in five years, with the share price at $161.91. Market sentiment has reset sharply as industry headwinds weigh on the stock. The company continues to rely on recurring revenues, high customer loyalty and the Danaher Business Systems to support its operations. For investors watching NYSE:DHR, the reset in sentiment is striking. The stock is down 18.3% over the past month and 29.7% year to date, leaving it near a five year valuation low...
